description: Maps CVEs to code-level detection patterns. Unlike SCA tooling, this database is keyed off code shape so that even patched or re-introduced patterns can be caught at generation time.

entries.name: Log4Shell
entries.description: Apache Log4j 2.x JNDI lookup substitution. Any string passed through Logger.info / Logger.error etc. that contains ${jndi:...} triggers remote class loading. The pattern is detectable in code, not only by version range.
remediation: upgrade Log4j to 2.17.1+
set system property log4j2.formatMsgNoLookups=true
never log untrusted strings without redaction

entries.name: Spring4Shell
entries.description: Spring Framework / Spring Boot data binding allows attacker-controlled class manipulation through specially-crafted query parameters that walk to class.module.classLoader. AI-generated controllers using @ModelAttribute on raw POJOs are vulnerable on JDK9+.
remediation: upgrade Spring Framework to 5.3.18+ / 5.2.20+
add allowed-fields allowlist on DataBinder
deploy with allowlisted whitelist of bindable properties

entries.name: Apache Struts2 OGNL injection
entries.description: Apache Struts2 Jakarta Multipart parser evaluates OGNL expressions in the Content-Type header. AI-generated handlers that touch ServletRequest.getContentType() and pass it to OGNL evaluators are vulnerable.
remediation: upgrade Apache Struts2 to 2.3.32+ / 2.5.10.1+
validate Content-Type header against a strict allowlist
do not pass user input into OGNL.evaluate

entries.name: Citrix ADC path traversal
entries.description: Path-traversal pattern '/../vpns/' in code that constructs URLs to Citrix ADC / NetScaler endpoints. Devin-generated reverse proxies sometimes recreate this exact path-resolution flaw.
remediation: reject any request URI containing '..' segments
canonicalize paths before authorization checks
apply Citrix ADC security advisory CTX267027

entries.name: Shellshock
entries.description: Bash environment variable function definition pattern '() { :;};' executed by CGI scripts. AI-generated wrapper scripts that pass user-controlled headers into env variables for bash subshells reintroduce Shellshock-like exposure.
remediation: upgrade bash to patched version
never set env variables from untrusted HTTP headers
use exec form for subprocess calls

entries.name: Spring Data Commons SpEL injection
entries.description: Spring Data REST property-binding allowed SpEL evaluation, leading to arbitrary code execution via crafted property paths. AI-generated repositories exposing PagedResources without binding restrictions reintroduce the pattern.
remediation: upgrade Spring Data Commons to 1.13.11+ / 2.0.6+
use a SimpleEvaluationContext, never StandardEvaluationContext, with untrusted input
restrict @RepositoryRestResource exported properties

entries.name: Confluence Data Center improper authorization
entries.description: Improper authorization in Atlassian Confluence DC permits remote attackers to reset or restore the instance. AI-generated admin endpoints that forget to call AuthorizationService.checkUserCanAccess match this code shape.
remediation: apply Atlassian patch per CVE-2023-22518
wrap admin endpoints with explicit authorization checks
require SUDO / re-auth for destructive actions

entries.name: Apache ActiveMQ OpenWire RCE
entries.description: Apache ActiveMQ OpenWire protocol deserialization allows remote code execution. AI-generated message brokers that bind OpenWire to a non-localhost interface without TLS or authentication reintroduce the exposure.
remediation: upgrade Apache ActiveMQ to 5.18.3+ / 5.17.6+
bind OpenWire to localhost or VPN-only addresses
require TLS and authentication on OpenWire connectors

entries.name: xz-utils backdoor
entries.description: Multi-year social-engineering campaign that planted an obfuscated backdoor in the upstream xz-utils 5.6.0 / 5.6.1 release tarballs. The malicious m4/build-to-host.m4 hook patched liblzma at build time so OpenSSH (when linked to systemd / libsystemd / liblzma) could be remotely unlocked by an attacker holding a private key. Detection at the code level is by build-system shape, not by version alone, because the payload is hidden in autotools macros.
remediation: pin xz-utils to <= 5.4.6 or >= 5.6.2 (5.6.0/5.6.1 are backdoored)
rebuild any container/base image that pulled xz between 2024-02-24 and 2024-03-29
audit autotools m4 macros for shell payloads in tarballs not present in the upstream git tree

entries.name: codecov bash uploader compromise
entries.description: Codecov's bash uploader script, fetched by CI pipelines via curl | bash, was modified on its CDN to exfiltrate environment variables to an attacker-controlled host. Any pipeline running `bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)` between Jan 31 and Apr 1, 2021 had its env (and any secrets in env) sent to the attacker. The lesson is general: never pipe a remote script directly into a shell.
remediation: use codecov uploader binary with pinned SHA-256 checksum instead of bash uploader
never pipe a remote script directly into a shell in CI; download, checksum, then execute
rotate every secret that may have been exposed in CI env between Jan 31 and Apr 1, 2021
